title: Tooltip Icons
description: Adds icons to tooltips of some items.
body:
# **Tooltip Icons**

This mod adds fancy icons to tooltips of some items in the game.

### Configuration:

Configuration can be customized by editing the tooltipicons.json file located in the config folder. The settings allow for:

*   Enable or disable specific tooltips individually.
*   Adjust the rendering scale of shulker box tooltip.

Some tooltips in this mod were inspired by Inspecio mod.
